overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim walking through 9th century Baghdad. The character moves from an interior courtyard through bustling market streets and plazas, passing NPCs, merchants, and animals. The environment features Islamic architecture with sandstone buildings, arches, domes, and decorative tilework under bright desert sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with pool and columns

events.description: exits covered courtyard through stone archway into sunlit exterior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the courtyard and exiting through the archway into the open street

notable_agents.action: guard in yellow armor standing near the archway entrance

entered.detail: rectangular water feature with blue tiles along the edge of the courtyard
large arched stone doorway leading from courtyard to exterior street
red and orange patterned carpets laid on the stone floor
tall sandstone pillars supporting the courtyard arcade
rustic wooden storage unit with pottery and goods

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shaded interior courtyard featuring a pool, decorative rugs, and stone columns. The character walks forward and exits through a large stone archway around the 3-second mark, transitioning from the sheltered courtyard into the bright sunlight of the exterior street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large city gate

events.description: horse and rider pass by from right to left in the plaza
passes through the large stone gate into the inner city area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward and through the large city gate, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: horse with rider moving across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: massive fortified stone archway with metal reinforcements marking the city entrance
tall defensive sandstone walls with small windows
wooden carts and tables displaying goods and textiles

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a wide sunlit plaza with dirt ground, approaching a large fortified city gate. A horse and rider cross the plaza around 10 seconds. The character passes through the gate at 15 seconds, leaving the exterior walls behind and entering the denser urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial market street with vendor stalls

events.description: turns right into the main market street from the plaza
dodges around a horse rider moving through the narrow market street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded market street, turning right and weaving between pedestrians and a horse

notable_agents.action: horse rider moving through the market crowd toward the camera

entered.detail: tan fabric canopy shading a spice merchant's stall
burlap bags filled with goods stacked beside the stall
colorful hanging textiles and cloths displayed for sale
clay pots and ceramic vessels arranged on wooden tables

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a bustling commercial street, the character navigates through a market area with fabric awnings, spice sacks, and pottery displays. The street is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and the character maneuvers around a horse rider at 22 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: flower market street leading to domed plaza

events.description: passes large display of pink flowers piled on the right side of the street
enters open plaza area with prominent domed building ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded street past the flower vendor and entering the open plaza with the domed structure

notable_agents.action: merchant sitting beside a large pile of pink flowers

entered.detail: large mound of pink and white flower blossoms displayed for sale on the ground
prominent sandstone structure with a large central dome and Islamic architectural details
tall date palms lining the street and plaza entrance
blue and turquoise geometric mosaic patterns on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a street lined with palm trees and decorative blue tilework, passing a large display of pink flowers on the right. The crowd density increases as the character enters an open plaza at 35 seconds, with a prominent domed building visible ahead.

events.description: begins ascending the stone stairs in the narrow passage
camel with rider passes by on the stairs moving upward

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs in the narrow alley, moving upward through the city levels

notable_agents.action: camel with rider ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending between tall buildings
colorful fabric canopy stretched between buildings providing shade
crude wooden fencing and construction materials along the stairway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alleyway and begins ascending stone stairs at 39 seconds, passing under fabric awnings that provide shade. A camel and rider move up the stairs ahead, and the character continues climbing toward the upper levels of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded, shaded courtyard into the bright, bustling urban density of 9th-century Baghdad. It begins within a sheltered interior featuring a pool and decorative rugs, moving forward through a large stone archway that opens into the blinding sunlight of a wide dirt plaza. As the camera passes a horse and rider and proceeds through a fortified city gate, the scene shifts into a crowded commercial street filled with fabric awnings, spice sacks, and pottery. The path then leads past palm trees and vibrant blue tilework toward a large domed building in an open plaza, before turning into a narrow alleyway. Finally, the camera ascends a set of stone stairs beneath shaded awnings, following a camel and rider toward the city's upper levels.
